changes: Auto Jobs: smarter path reachability — routes to a job's server are now recomputed live from each relay's maintenance/access state instead of trusting the game's reachability flag (which goes stale right after a relay is knocked down). A job behind a freshly K/D'd or restricted relay is now correctly postponed instead of failing on accept.

Auto Jobs: new optional "hack transit nodes" switch (off by default). When on, Auto Jobs will hack a restricted relay that sits on the route to a job's server to open the path, then carry on with the job.
